summary: Iteration 5 testing: CRM focus fix + CSV import, Dashboard branch filter + drill-down, Students bulk promotion. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Syntax error in Enquiries.js (missing 'function EnquiryCard' declaration causing compile error), (2) BarChart drill-down onClick not working due to custom shape component - fixed by adding onClick on Bar component directly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Enquiries.js line 53 had syntax error - 'function EnquiryCard' declaration was missing, causing app to fail to compile entirely. Fixed by restoring the function keyword.
FIXED: Dashboard.js BarChart onClick on BarChart wrapper did not fire handleBarClick when using custom shape prop - moved onClick to Bar component directly, which properly receives data payload.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js (fixed bar drill-down: added onClick on Bar component)

test_results.enquiry_form_focus: PASS - FormFields outside component, typing 'Test Student' maintained focus without loss
test_results.crm_buttons_visible: PASS - Template, Import CSV, Add Enquiry buttons all visible
test_results.csv_import_2rows: PASS - Imported 2/2 rows successfully into correct stage columns (followup, new)
test_results.dashboard_branch_filter_kpis: PASS - Selecting Pune Branch changes Revenue KPI from ₹256K to ₹0K
test_results.dashboard_revenue_chart_bar_click: PASS (after fix) - Clicking Mumbai Branch bar shows drill-down with Anjali Singh, JEE Main, ₹62,900 Paid
test_results.dashboard_branch_filter_allbranches: PASS - All Branches shows 3 bars, specific branch shows only that branch
test_results.students_checkboxes: PASS - Checkboxes on each row, select-all in header
test_results.students_checkbox_no_navigation: PASS - Click checkbox does NOT navigate (stopPropagation implemented)
test_results.students_status_filter: PASS - 'active' filter shows 5 rows vs 10 for all
test_results.students_bulk_promotion: PASS - Select 2 students → bulk bar appears → Generate Re-enrolment Leads → 2/2 created in CRM
test_results.crm_reenrollment_leads: PASS - Re-enrollment leads visible in CRM Pipeline New column with source shown as 're-enrollment' label (mapped to Walk-in in UI since 're-enrollment' not in SOURCE_LABELS)

seed_data_creation: Created test enquiries via CSV import and re-enrollment lead generation during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete. Two bugs fixed: (1) EnquiryCard function declaration missing in Enquiries.js, (2) BarChart drill-down onClick moved to Bar component. All 10 test scenarios pass. Re-enrollment source maps to 'Walk-in' in UI (expected per misc_info). CSV import, branch filter, drill-down, bulk promotion all working.
